summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 22 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 157 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 107 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 49 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 43 days past due with 22 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **28 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $36,338 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 19 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **35 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $22,633 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 33 days past due with 19 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 17. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **48 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $28,003 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 16. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **67 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **47 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,463 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 45 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,981 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Karim-Merchant:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 11. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 19 days past due with 7 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue for multiple days running — no progress. This needs a direct conversation with the PM. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $28,107 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 46 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 39 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 34 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jonas De Cardenas:** Carrying 19 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 12 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Rey:** Carrying 7 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

344 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **311 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 22 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$145,921 in payments going out this week** across 68 tasks — make sure funds are available. $27,683 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 34. This needs to turn around today.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 17 overdue — oldest first. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 14 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **47 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 58 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue stuck for days — needs direct action, not just monitoring. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Giselle Garcia: Giselle Garcia's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 46. This needs to turn around today.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 19 overdue — oldest first. **35 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 40 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 16 overdue — oldest first. **67 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 67 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Karim-Merchant:** 11 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 39. This needs to turn around today.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 22 overdue (oldest: 43d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **28 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 17 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **48 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 48 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jonas De Cardenas: Jonas De Cardenas's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 19. This needs to turn around today.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** 19 overdue (oldest: 33d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Ginger Brown:** 12 overdue (oldest: 45d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
